label: Missing part
description: Specifies a body part that may be absent on pawns of this kind at spawn time, along with the injury responsible and the probability.

bodyPart.label: Body part
bodyPart.description: BodyPartDef identifying the part that may be missing.

injury.label: Injury
injury.description: HediffDef applied to represent the missing-part wound, such as MissingBodyPart.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability (0–1) that this part will be missing when the pawn is generated.
